sent_simp: 这家店刚到了几部新款手机。
sent_trad: 這家店剛到了幾部新款手機。
pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn gāng dào le jǐ bù xīnkuǎn shǒujī.
english: This store just received several new-model smartphones.

sent_simp: 学开手动挡时，踩离合的时机很重要。
sent_trad: 學開手動擋時，踩離合的時機很重要。
pinyin: Xué kāi shǒudòng dǎng shí, cǎi lí hé de shíjī hěn zhòngyào.
english: When learning to drive a manual car, timing the clutch is very important.

sent_simp: 施工队正在加固这段公路的路基。
sent_trad: 施工隊正在加固這段公路的路基。
pinyin: Shīgōng duì zhèngzài jiāgù zhè duàn gōnglù de lùjī.
english: The construction crew is reinforcing the roadbed of this section of highway.
